response:
<> In PHP, you can replace a URL in a string using the `str_replace()` function. Here's an example of how to do it: ```php $str = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $oldUrl = "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1"; $newUrl = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $str = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $str); echo $str; ``` This code will replace the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the string. Here is a palindrome in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
